Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.group

Class FlixelBasicGroup<T extends FlixelBasic>

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.FlixelBasic
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.group.FlixelBasicGroup<T>
Type Parameters:
T - Member type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable, FlixelDestroyable, FlixelDrawable, FlixelUpdatable, FlixelBasicGroupable<T>, FlixelGroupable<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
FlixelState
public abstract class FlixelBasicGroup<T extends FlixelBasic> extends FlixelBasic implements FlixelBasicGroupable<T>
A FlixelBasic that owns a FlixelGroup of other FlixelBasic members, with batch update(float) / draw(Batch), recycle(), and destroy() that tears down members.

Member list operations are delegated to an internal FlixelGroup; getMemberList() exposes it when you need the raw container.

remove(T) and FlixelGroupable.detach(T) only unlink members; they do not call FlixelBasic.destroy(). Prefer FlixelBasic.kill() / recycle() for reuse. See FlixelBasic for lifecycle guidance.

See Also:
  • FlixelGroup
  • FlixelState

    Revives the first dead member, or uses createMemberForRecycle(), revives it, adds it when under max size, and returns it.

    • ensureMembers

    • add

      public void add(T member)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelGroupable
      Adds a member to this group.
      Specified by:
      add in interface FlixelGroupable<T extends FlixelBasic>

    • remove

      public void remove(T member)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelGroupable
      Removes the member from this group only. Does not interpret or tear down the member; see FlixelBasicGroupable for optional destroy semantics on FlixelBasic members.
      Specified by:
      remove in interface FlixelGroupable<T extends FlixelBasic>

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelGroupable
      Removes all members from the group without touching member instances.
      Specified by:
      clear in interface FlixelGroupable<T extends FlixelBasic>

    • update

      public void update(float elapsed)
      Description copied from class: FlixelBasic
      Updates the logic of this FlixelBasic.

      Override this function to update your object's position and appearance. This is where most game rules and behavioral code will go.

      Specified by:
      update in interface FlixelUpdatable
      Overrides:
      update in class FlixelBasic
      Parameters:
      elapsed - Seconds elapsed since the last frame.

    • draw

      public void draw(com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.Batch batch)
      Description copied from class: FlixelBasic
      Override this function to control how the object is drawn. Doing so is rarely necessary but can be very useful.
      Specified by:
      draw in interface FlixelDrawable
      Overrides:
      draw in class FlixelBasic
      Parameters:
      batch - The batch used for rendering.

    • destroy

      public void destroy()
      Description copied from class: FlixelBasic
      Cleans up this object so it can be garbage-collected. A destroyed FlixelBasic should not be used anymore. Use FlixelBasic.kill() if you only want to disable it temporarily and FlixelBasic.revive() it later.

      Override this function to clean up any resources used by this object, such as textures, fonts, sounds, etc.

      This function is called automatically when FlixelBasic.dispose() or FlixelBasic.reset() is executed, so you don't need to call it manually.

      Specified by:
      destroy in interface FlixelDestroyable
      Overrides:
      destroy in class FlixelBasic
      See Also:
      • FlixelBasic.dispose()
      • FlixelBasic.reset()

    • recycle

      @Nullable public T recycle()
      Revives the first dead member, or uses createMemberForRecycle(), revives it, adds it when under max size, and returns it.
      Returns:
      A member ready to use, or null if nothing could be recycled or created.

    • getMembers

      @Nullable public @Nullable com.badlogic.gdx.utils.SnapshotArray<T> getMembers()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelGroupable
      Returns the backing array, or null if the implementation has not allocated it yet (FlixelGroup).
      Specified by:
      getMembers in interface FlixelGroupable<T extends FlixelBasic>

    • getMaxSize

      public int getMaxSize()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelGroupable
      Returns the maximum number of members allowed. When 0, the group can grow without limit.
      Specified by:
      getMaxSize in interface FlixelGroupable<T extends FlixelBasic>

    • setMaxSize

      public void setMaxSize(int maxSize)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelGroupable
      Sets the maximum number of members allowed. Values less than 0 are clamped to 0 (unlimited).
      Specified by:
      setMaxSize in interface FlixelGroupable<T extends FlixelBasic>
